failure_modes: False positives due to short-term fluctuations misidentified as long-term trends.
Missing individuals with gradual declines or declines in other well-being indicators not explicitly tracked.
Over-reliance on deterministic features, potentially overlooking nuanced cases.
guardrails: Cross-validate identified individuals with age and city information to identify potential biases or anomalies.
Manually review a sample of identified individuals to assess the accuracy of the automated assessment.
Implement a feedback loop to refine the model based on manual review results.
planner_result.strategy: Focus on identifying citizens with declining activity and sleep indices, coupled with increasing environmental exposure, as indicators of suboptimal well-being trajectories. Prioritize candidates with multiple consecutive declines and negative slopes in activity and sleep, and positive slopes in exposure. Leverage risk_hint as a secondary filter.
